identity.name: Sotto Voce Wine & Pasta Bar
identity.address: 595 College St, Toronto, ON M6G 1A9, Canada
identity.location: 595 College St, Toronto, ON M6G 1A9, Canada

narrative.summary: You're on a Little Italy stretch of College where the streetcar rumbles past vintage storefronts, stepping into a compact wine-bar-sized room where tables sit close enough that you can smell the burrata on your neighbour's plate. The Italian cooking doesn't cut corners on proteins—actual chunks of lobster in the ravioli, lamb braised long enough to collapse into the rigatoni. The owner knows regulars by name, and Wine Wednesday actually means something here.

blocks.title: The Space
blocks.body: You're on a Little Italy stretch of College where the streetcar rumbles past vintage storefronts and corner trattorias. Inside, you'll find yourself in a compact, wine-bar-sized room where tables sit close enough that you can smell the burrata on your neighbour's plate. The space feels more neighbourhood hang than destination dining—low lighting, brick or exposed elements, the kind of place where the owner knows regulars by name and Wine Wednesday actually means something.

blocks.title: The Food
blocks.body: This is Italian cooking that doesn't cut corners on the proteins—actual chunks of lobster in the ravioli, lamb that's been braised long enough to collapse into the rigatoni. The burrata comes with fresh orange segments, which sounds precious but works because they're not trying to reinvent pasta, just make it better than you'd expect for neighbourhood prices. Specials rotate often enough that you're not eating the same menu as last month.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Always a great meal and welcoming atmosphere. Love how there is always specials. The lamb rigatoni was so tender and flavourful with a generous portion. Lobster ravioli had lots of lobster in it and the cream sauce wasnt too heavy. Burrata with fresh orange is a nice touch, such a great appetizer! Will come back again for Wine Wednesday- great wine list!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Hosted my birthday party (private event) at Sotto Voce. From my initial inquiry email right up to the day of the event, Anita was nothing short of spectacular - warm, genuine, engaged, accommodating, attentive to detail. And her staff reflected these qualities as well. Food and drinks were amazing! Guests had a great time. My husband and I were very impressed. They’ve definitely gained a number of new customers after this event!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "My Goshhhh, the Welcome by Tatiana reminds me of a 5 💎 Hotel I came from in Barbados 🇧🇧, the Sandy Lane Hotel...

Her level of Service excellence and attention to detail is impeccable..

Also, she took the order while I was on my way to Sotto Voce, being mindful of the time the kitchen closes...

The Food was without a fault, flavours amazing and tantalizing to my palate (compliments the Chef)...

And the ambience, was an Oasis in a bustling city..

Overall, I rate this small and personalized Restaurant 5 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟"

blocks.title: The Menu
blocks.body:
SALADS & APPETIZERS
• Romana
   hearts of romaine in our house caesar dressing
• Rustica
   roasted beets with arugula, pistacchio and goats cheese tossed in a champagne vinaigrette
• Figaro
   fresh figs, toasted walnuts, mixed greens and bleu cheese in a walnut oil & balsamic vinaigrette
• Bruschetta
   grilled country bread rubbed with garlic and basil, sprinkled with cracked black peppercorns and served with marinated roma tomatoes
• Crostini
   chianti-caramelized figs, prosciutto, goats cheese on a toasted baguette

CURED & RAW
⭐ Carpaccio
   black peppercorn encrusted seared beef tenderloin with pomegranate seed arugula and shavings of parmigiano reggiano
• Tuna Crudi
   thinly sliced yellowfin tuna seasonsed with herbs, lemon and EVOO
• Cozze
   P.E.I. mussels steamed in a spicy tomato sauce
• Sicilian Meatballs
   three all-beef meatballs made with currants and pine nuts, slow cooked in our own tomato sauce

PASTA & RISOTTO
• Aglio e Olio
   spaghettini with chilies, garlic and extra virgin olive oil
⭐ Spaghettini alla Carbonara
   with crispy pancetta and parmigiano reggiano
• Puttanesca Misti
   spaghettini with mixed seafood, capers, anchovy, chilies and black olives in tomato sauce
• Dal Mare
   linguine with black tiger shrimp in a sun-dried tomato and dill vodka rose
• Campagne
   potato gnocchi with hot italian sausage, rapini and cherry tomatoes in white wine, garlic, lemon and olive oil
⭐ Wild Mushroom Risotto
   shiitake and oyster mushrooms with truffle oil

MAIN COURSES
• Pesce
   pan seared fillet of branzino with capers and tomato salsa
• Carne
   grilled 6oz grey farms flat iron steak with balsamic caramelized onions
• Agnello
   grilled marinated rack of lamb, served with our house gremolata
